source: macOS-native plugin catalog — converted from nppPluginList

plugins.name: AutoSave
plugins.description: Auto-save files on timer or focus-loss. macOS native port — needs Swift Timer + NSDocument integration.
plugins.author: Franco Stellari

plugins.name: CollectionInterface
plugins.description: Download and install UDL/Theme collections from GitHub. macOS stub — needs URLSession + native install UI.
plugins.author: pryrt

plugins.name: ComparePlus
plugins.description: Advanced text comparison tool. macOS stub — dual-panel diff view needs native Swift UI.
plugins.author: Pavel Nedev

plugins.name: Dark Mode C
plugins.description: [BUILT-IN] macOS native dark/light mode switching via system appearance
plugins.author: pullitall

plugins.name: Discord Rich Presence
plugins.description: [NOT AVAILABLE ON macOS] Shows in discord the file that is currently being edited in Notepad++.. Reason: Requires Discord SDK integration. macOS Discord SDK exists but unstable, and integration effort is very high.
plugins.author: Zukaritasu

plugins.name: Emoji Description
plugins.description: Displays character encoding info: Unicode code point, decimal/hex values, HTML entity, UTF-8 bytes. macOS native port.
plugins.author: Ruberoid

plugins.name: Fixed-width Data Visualizer
plugins.description: Fixed-width data visualization with column/field display. macOS stub — needs NSTableView native UI.
plugins.author: Shridhar Kumar

plugins.name: GotoLineCol
plugins.description: [BUILT-IN] Go to Line/Column dialog (Cmd+L)
plugins.author: Shridhar Kumar

plugins.name: HEX-Editor
plugins.description: Hex editor for binary files. macOS stub — needs native hex view panel.
plugins.author: Jens Lorenz

plugins.name: HTML Tag
plugins.description: HTML/XML tag navigation, entity encoding/decoding, JS character encoding/decoding. macOS native port.
plugins.author: Martijn Coppoolse

plugins.name: JSTool
plugins.description: JavaScript formatting, minification, and JSON viewer. macOS native port of JSTool.
plugins.author: Sun Junwen

plugins.name: Language Selector
plugins.description: [BUILT-IN] Language menu with auto-detection and manual selection
plugins.author: Abdellah Hassaine

plugins.name: LanguageHelp
plugins.description: Language-specific help file viewer with keyword lookup. macOS stub — needs native help viewer.
plugins.author: Franco Stellari

plugins.name: Linter++
plugins.description: Real-time code linting against external linters (eslint, pylint, shellcheck, etc.). macOS native port.
plugins.author: Tom Tanner

plugins.name: Markdown Table Editor
plugins.description: Markdown table alignment and editing. macOS stub — interactive table editing needs NSTableView UI.
plugins.author: Kreout

plugins.name: MenuIcons
plugins.description: [NOT AVAILABLE ON macOS] Adds icons to the main menu, tab menu, context menu, and the tabs themselves.. Reason: macOS NSMenuItem does not support icons in menu items. Windows-specific UI feature.
plugins.author: Franco Stellari

plugins.name: Mime tools
plugins.description: MIME encoding/decoding: Base64, Quoted-printable, URL encode/decode. macOS native port.
plugins.author: Don HO

plugins.name: MultiReplace
plugins.description: Multi-pattern search & replace across files. macOS stub — multi-rule UI needs native panel.
plugins.author: Thomas Knoefel

plugins.name: NestedDSV Data Visualizer
plugins.description: Hierarchical DSV data visualization. macOS stub — needs NSOutlineView panel UI.
plugins.author: Shridhar Kumar

plugins.name: Auto Detect Indention
plugins.description: Detects indentation (tab or spaces) and auto-adjusts Tab settings. macOS native port of nppAutoDetectIndent.
plugins.author: Mike Tzou (Chocobo1)

plugins.name: Notepad++ bplist plugin
plugins.description: Binary plist viewer/editor. macOS native port using plutil — full editing needs native UI.
plugins.author: Sergiy Azarovsky

plugins.name: Chinese Converter
plugins.description: Traditional and Simplified Chinese conversion. macOS native port using OpenCC.
plugins.author: lkk9898969

plugins.name: Npp Converter
plugins.description: ASCII to Hex and Hex to ASCII converter. macOS native port of Npp Converter.
plugins.author: Don HO

plugins.name: NppCrossCheck
plugins.description: Cross-check two lists in the current document. Shows intersection, difference, and union. macOS native port.
plugins.author: Pablo Lopez

plugins.name: NppNetNote
plugins.description: [NOT AVAILABLE ON macOS] Allows the same document to be edited in real time on two different computers. Only needs a network connection between the two.. Reason: Real-time collaborative editing requires complex network protocol implementation (WebSocket/CRDT).
plugins.author: Harrybharry

plugins.name: NppExport
plugins.description: [BUILT-IN] Export as HTML/RTF

plugins.name: NppFTP
plugins.description: FTP/SFTP file browser and transfer. macOS stub — native file browser UI needed.
plugins.author: ashish_kulz

plugins.name: JSON Viewer
plugins.description: JSON formatter and minifier. macOS native port using python json.tool.
plugins.author: Kapil Ratnani, Rajendra Singh

plugins.name: NppJumpList
plugins.description: [NOT AVAILABLE ON macOS] Adds Windows 7 jump list support.. Reason: Windows 7+ Jump List feature. macOS has no equivalent OS concept (no taskbar jump lists).
plugins.author: ahvgeezer

plugins.name: Notepad++ Plugin Demo
plugins.description: NotepadMac plugin demo — demonstrates the macOS plugin API and manifest format.
plugins.author: Don HO

plugins.name: Notepad++ Plugin Template
plugins.description: NotepadMac plugin development template. Copy and modify to create new plugins.
plugins.author: Don HO

plugins.name: Snippets
plugins.description: Code snippet manager with panel UI. macOS stub — needs NSTableView snippet panel.
plugins.author: Frank Fesevur

plugins.name: Task List
plugins.description: Scan document for TODO, FIXME, NOTE items. macOS native port of Task List.
plugins.author: blitowitz

plugins.name: NppTextViz
plugins.description: Hide/show lines by pattern for log analysis. macOS native port of NppTextViz.
plugins.author: Jakub Dvorak

plugins.name: NppVim
plugins.description: Vim-style editing mode and key bindings. macOS stub — needs native key-binding translation layer.
plugins.author: h-jangra

plugins.name: OpenSelection
plugins.description: [BUILT-IN] Open file from selected text / Open containing folder
plugins.author: Franco Stellari

plugins.name: Pork to Sausage
plugins.description: Pass selected text to any command-line program as input, replace selection with output. macOS native port.
plugins.author: Don HO

plugins.name: RAScript
plugins.description: RAScript grammar definition and parsing. macOS stub — custom grammar parser needs native implementation.
plugins.author: Joshua Raphael

plugins.name: RunMe
plugins.description: Execute the currently open file based on shell association. macOS native port using open/exec.
plugins.author: Franco Stellari

plugins.name: rustnpp
plugins.description: Run or build Rust cargo projects and .rs files. macOS native port using cargo CLI.
plugins.author: nika-begiashvili

plugins.name: SecurePad
plugins.description: Encrypt/decrypt documents with AES-256. macOS native port using Security framework / gpg.
plugins.author: Dominic Tobias

plugins.name: Select N' Launch
plugins.description: Save selected text as temp file and open with system. macOS native port.
plugins.author: Don HO

plugins.name: Select to Clipboard
plugins.description: Auto-copy selected text to clipboard (like PuTTY). macOS native port using pbcopy.
plugins.author: Jakub Dvorak

plugins.name: Session Manager
plugins.description: [BUILT-IN] Session persistence (auto-save/restore open files)
plugins.author: Mike Foster

plugins.name: SpeechPlugin
plugins.description: Text-to-speech using macOS built-in say command. macOS native port of SpeechPlugin.
plugins.author: Jim Xochellis

plugins.name: StayAwake
plugins.description: Prevent macOS sleep using caffeinate. macOS native port of StayAwake.
plugins.author: Shridhar Kumar

plugins.name: TakeNotes
plugins.description: Quick note-taking with timestamped filenames. macOS stub — needs native note panel UI.
plugins.author: Franco Stellari

plugins.name: TC Syslog Finder
plugins.description: Find and open Teamcenter syslog files. macOS stub — needs native file browser integration.
plugins.author: bsagarzazu

plugins.name: TopMost
plugins.description: [BUILT-IN] Window pinning / floating (stay on top)
plugins.author: Franco Stellari

plugins.name: TreeSitter
plugins.description: [NOT AVAILABLE ON macOS] Integrate Tree-sitter to Notepad++. AST-based syntax highlighting and code folding for many languages.. Reason: Tree-sitter integration requires deep modification of Scintilla lexer pipeline. Extremely complex.
plugins.author: Tuomas Hietanen

plugins.name: URL Encode/Decode Plugin
plugins.description: URL encode and decode selected text. macOS native port.
plugins.author: Rajendra Singh

plugins.name: Virtual Folders
plugins.description: Virtual folder tree panel for grouping files. macOS stub — needs NSTreeController/NSOutlineView UI.
plugins.author: Fatih Coşkun

plugins.name: VSCode Keymap NPP
plugins.description: VS Code keyboard shortcut mapping. macOS stub — needs native key binding translation layer.
plugins.author: philip

plugins.name: WebEdit
plugins.description: HTML tag abbreviation expansion and selection wrapping. macOS native port of WebEdit.
plugins.author: Alexander Iljin
